description:
Primary Domain:

metro.hospital (Internet Site - before it went down)



Internal/Email Domain:
metro-hospital.net (internal facing nomenclature / business email)


Compromised Data Volume:
5.355 TB of sensitive medical files


Patient Records:
123,458 patients (scripts, radiology, eKG, MRI, ultrasound, blood work)


Additional Assets:
Complete email archives, SonicWall VPN access credentials, network infrastructure information, internal backups


Payment Status:
UNPAID 400 xmr - Private negotiation / Ransom demand active


 info : Metro Hospital USA suffered a full-scale compromise. Over 5.3TB of mission-critical medical data exfiltrated, including radiology images, electronic health records (EHR), diagnostic results, and personal identifiable health information. Additionally, SonicWall appliance access and complete corporate email repositories were obtained. Decryption key and deletion of stolen data available upon ransom fulfillment. Deadline strict.

Woodland Trade Company is a full-service tool design and manufacturing firm based in Tacoma, Washington, specializing in tool design and fabrication using composites, metals, and 3D printed hardware. The company serves a diverse range of industries including aerospace, automotive, marine, medical, and space, and is recognized for its engineering design, CNC machining, and additive manufacturing capabilities.We will upload 13gb of corporate data soon. Detailed employee information (passport, DLs, SSNs, addresses, phones, emails and so on), financials, payment details, credit card information, projects, drawings and specification contracts with government facilities and big names like BOEING and so on.

https://ccbc.edu
									The college serves a diverse student body, including recent high school graduates, adult learners, and those seeking career advancement. By focusing heavily on workforce development but neglecting its security, the college compromised hundreds of records containing personal and confidential information, as well as financial documents, projects, and contracts, which were subsequently leaked to the public.

Westamerica Communications services include commercial lithographic and digital printing, direct mailing and online marketing, strategy and branding, distribution and fulfillment.We will upload over 70gb of corporate data soon. Employee personal information (DLs and so on), customer files, detailed financials, payment details, projects, etc.

Charles River Insurance is an independent insurance agency headquartered in the state of Massachusetts that focuses on delivering personalized risk management and insurance solutions to individuals and businesses.We will upload 63gb of corporate data soon. Detailed employee andcustomer personal information (passport, DLs, SSNs, addresses, phones, emails and so on), detailed financials, payment details, projects, etc.

post_title: American Vintage Home, Briggs Plumbing Products, Genco Manufacturing, American Vintage Hom
description: We obtained about 11gb of data of the following companies:American Vintage Home specializes in heating, air conditioning, and plumbing services tailored for vintage homes in the Chicago North Shore area. Their expert technicians focus on preserving the charm of older homes while providing modern HVAC solutions, including high-velocity and ductless systems.Briggs Plumbing Products, Inc. manufactures and markets enameled steel products, vitreous china, and faucets for residential, hospitality, and commercial applications. Founded in 1908 and headquartered in Goose Creek, SC.Genco Manufacturing specializes in high-quality, American-made utility truck beds, offering a range of products including the Genco Royal Utility Truck Bed and Genco Sporting Flatbed Body.American Vintage Home specializes in heating, air conditioning, and plumbing services tailored for vintage homes in the Chicago North Shore area.Associates of Clifton Park offers a range of insurance products including long-term care insurance, Medicare supplements, life insurance, and group disability insurance. You will find personal employee personal data, HR files, medical information, client information, project files, confidential files, accounting and financials, contracts and agreements and so on.
